meaning: n.(鍦ㄨ垶鍙颁笂婕旂殑)鎴忓墽,鎴忓墽鑹烘湳
examples: What you need is a drama coach.
He knew nothing of Greek drama.
Her drama teacher spotted her ability.
Jumpy, a family drama starring Tamsin Greig, sold-out four days after its opening night in 2011.
The characters in this drama are the government, the company, the advisers and the clients.
